title: Executive Order 11739—Adjusting Rates of Pay for Certain Statutory Pay Systems

flags.justification: Precise, specific dollar figures are set across multiple statutory pay systems, with an explicit statutory ceiling (Sec. 4) tying all rates to Executive Schedule Level V.
Extremely detailed, objective dollar figures for each pay grade across every covered system.
Multiple related pay-schedule adjustments (General Schedule, VA Medicine and Surgery, Foreign Service) all coherently serve one purpose: statutory pay adjustment.
A pay-schedule adjustment, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing pay-adjustment mechanism, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A routine, objectively-bounded federal pay adjustment.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A precise, objectively bounded pay-adjustment order.
